description: A project cleanup is required for the 'Smart Thermostat' project. Create a new document named 'Archive' with the ID Prefix 'ARCH'. Move all requirements with the 'Status' set to 'Obsolete' from the 'SRS' document into this new 'Archive' document and save the project. Ensure that no 'Obsolete' requirements remain in the 'SRS' document and that only 'Obsolete' requirements are moved.
